description: Deep causal chain: Istio pilot silently drops xDS push when merged DestinationRule dependency is updated

required_findings.description: Identifies mergeDestinationRule as the function that combines multiple DRs for the same host
Identifies that merged DR retains only one DR's metadata (name/namespace), losing contributing DRs' identity
Identifies AddConfigDependencies in sidecar.go as where DR dependencies are registered
Identifies DependsOnConfig as the function that checks if proxy needs push
Explains that only one ConfigKey is registered for merged DR, so updates to other contributing DRs are missed
Mentions consolidatedDestRules or the data structure that stores merged DRs
Identifies SidecarScope as the component that tracks config dependencies for push decisions
Mentions configDependencies map or HashCode used for dependency tracking
Identifies PushContext or destinationRuleIndex as the layer that stores and retrieves DRs
Mentions DefaultSidecarScopeForNamespace or ConvertToSidecarScope as where dependencies are built
Identifies that xDS push is silently skipped (not errored) when dependency is missing
Mentions PR #38088 or issue #38082 or the specific fix that introduced consolidatedDestRule.from tracking

file_references.description: Identifies pilot/pkg/model/sidecar.go (where AddConfigDependencies and DependsOnConfig live)
Identifies pilot/pkg/model/push_context.go (where destinationRuleIndex and consolidatedDestRules are defined)
Identifies pilot/pkg/xds/ directory or specific xDS push files
Identifies pilot/pkg/networking/core/ (where route/cluster builders consume DRs)

causal_chain.description: Hop 1-2: Multiple DestinationRules for same host are merged by mergeDestinationRule(), which combines subsets/traffic policy but retains only one DR's config.Config metadata (name/namespace)
Hop 3: SidecarScope.AddConfigDependencies registers ConfigKey{Kind:DestinationRule, Name:dr.Name, Namespace:dr.Namespace} using only the surviving metadata, missing contributing DRs
Hop 4: When the non-surviving DR is updated, DependsOnConfig() returns false because that DR's ConfigKey was never registered, so xDS push is skipped
Hop 5: Envoy sidecar retains stale CDS/RDS/EDS config because the push that would have delivered updated cluster/route configuration was filtered out

negative_checks.description: Does NOT blame Envoy, the Kubernetes API server, or network connectivity as root cause
Does NOT claim the bug is in VirtualService processing or in the route translation itself (it's in DR merging + dependency tracking)
